approaches.title: Greedy basin scanning with prefix sums
approaches.summary: Scans from left to right, using prefix sums and fallback right boundaries to calculate trapped water between progressively selected bars.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial O(n^2)-time, O(n)-space basin-scanning solution using prefix sums.

approaches.title: Two-pointer traversal
approaches.summary: Uses left and right pointers with running maximum heights to compute trapped water in a single linear pass with constant extra space.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaced basin scanning with an O(n)-time, O(1)-space two-pointer algorithm.
